query: SELECT entityName, missionStatement, organizationDescription, productsServices, shortTermGoals, longTermGoals, milestones FROM business_plans WHERE entityName = 'Real-Eye-Nation LLC';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute SELECT entityName, missionStatement, organizationDescription, productsServices, shortTermGoals, longTermGoals, milestones FROM business_plans WHERE entityName = 'Real-Eye-Nation LLC';

rows.missionStatement: To illuminate truth through authentic storytelling, empowering families and communities to document their histories, preserve their legacies, and share narratives that inspire generational transformation.
rows.organizationDescription: Real-Eye-Nation LLC operates as the media and content division within the LuvOnPurpose family of companies. The organization focuses on three primary areas: documentary content creation, narrative preservation services, and truth-based educational media. The company was established to address the gap in authentic family storytelling and community narrative preservation.
rows.productsServices: [{"name":"Documentary Production","description":"Full-service documentary creation for families and organizations","target":"Families, nonprofits, community organizations"},{"name":"Legacy Documentation","description":"Oral history recording, family archive digitization, story preservation","target":"Multi-generational families"},{"name":"Media Consulting","description":"Strategy and guidance for authentic storytelling","target":"Small businesses, nonprofits"},{"name":"Educational Content","description":"Video courses, tutorials, and training materials","target":"Academy students, community members"},{"name":"Content Licensing","description":"Licensing of original content for educational and commercial use","target":"Educational institutions, media companies"},{"name":"Brand Storytelling","description":"Authentic brand narrative development for mission-driven organizations","target":"Social enterprises, nonprofits"}]
rows.shortTermGoals: ["Equipment acquisition and setup", "Complete production training", "Launch pilot documentary project", "Build initial content library"]
rows.longTermGoals: ["Establish sustainable revenue from content licensing", "Expand team with trained family members", "Create distribution partnerships", "Build library of 100+ community narratives"]
rows.milestones: [{"milestone": "Equipment Acquisition", "status": "pending", "targetDate": "Month 3"}, {"milestone": "First Pilot Project", "status": "pending", "targetDate": "Month 6"}, {"milestone": "First Paying Client", "status": "pending", "targetDate": "Month 9"}, {"milestone": "Content Library (10 pieces)", "status": "pending", "targetDate": "Month 12"}]

stdout:
entityName	missionStatement	organizationDescription	productsServices	shortTermGoals	longTermGoals	milestones
Real-Eye-Nation LLC	To illuminate truth through authentic storytelling, empowering families and communities to document their histories, preserve their legacies, and share narratives that inspire generational transformation.	Real-Eye-Nation LLC operates as the media and content division within the LuvOnPurpose family of companies. The organization focuses on three primary areas: documentary content creation, narrative preservation services, and truth-based educational media. The company was established to address the gap in authentic family storytelling and community narrative preservation.	[{"name":"Documentary Production","description":"Full-service documentary creation for families and organizations","target":"Families, nonprofits, community organizations"},{"name":"Legacy Documentation","description":"Oral history recording, family archive digitization, story preservation","target":"Multi-generational families"},{"name":"Media Consulting","description":"Strategy and guidance for authentic storytelling","target":"Small businesses, nonprofits"},{"name":"Educational Content","description":"Video courses, tutorials, and training materials","target":"Academy students, community members"},{"name":"Content Licensing","description":"Licensing of original content for educational and commercial use","target":"Educational institutions, media companies"},{"name":"Brand Storytelling","description":"Authentic brand narrative development for mission-driven organizations","target":"Social enterprises, nonprofits"}]	["Equipment acquisition and setup", "Complete production training", "Launch pilot documentary project", "Build initial content library"]	["Establish sustainable revenue from content licensing", "Expand team with trained family members", "Create distribution partnerships", "Build library of 100+ community narratives"]	[{"milestone": "Equipment Acquisition", "status": "pending", "targetDate": "Month 3"}, {"milestone": "First Pilot Project", "status": "pending", "targetDate": "Month 6"}, {"milestone": "First Paying Client", "status": "pending", "targetDate": "Month 9"}, {"milestone": "Content Library (10 pieces)", "status": "pending", "targetDate": "Month 12"}]
